title: PMC Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 60 Junior Engineer, Health Inspector Posts
description: The Pune Municipal Corporation (PMC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 60 Junior Engineers and Health Inspectors. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 12th, Diploma, B.E./B. Tech can apply for the PMC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection pr...
